## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New command / feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup

## Checklist

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] New code has tests (or I've explained why tests aren't needed)
- [ ] README / help text updated if behaviour changed
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented
